description: Governor Sam Brownback implemented aggressive income tax cuts in Kansas, intended to serve as a 'shot of adrenaline' for the economy. The failure to meet revenue projections eventually turned public support sharply against the policy by 2017.

key_events.description: Legislation passed by the Kansas State Legislature.
Bond rating agencies downgrade state credit outlook due to revenue shortfall.
Public schools face budget cuts, triggering protests.
Kansas Legislature overrides the Governor's veto to repeal the tax cuts.

calibration_notes: Highlights the difference between initial theoretical support and the reality of failed fiscal outcomes.
